prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 11973→14281→17900→13432→20780，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025 年基准约 20780 名，较 2024 年大幅后移约 7348 名，主要受当年新高考改革（文理分科→物理/历史类）及选科要求变化影响；该校在山西省理科（物理类）招生计划 2021 年 94 人、2022 年 96 人、2023 年 95 人、2024 年 98 人、2025 年 98 人；2026 年计划 104 人，较 2025 年扩招 6 人（约 6.1%），小幅扩招对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第 83–85 名（2026 年第 83 名），排名稳定，属中上水平全国性大学；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（涉及师德师风事件）；抖音热度排名第 51（较热），综合热度约 63.8 万，关注度中等偏上；历史投档异常方面，2022 年曾在陕西文科出现位次骤降，但理科无显著断档记录；风景园林学为 A+（全国顶尖），与该校招生专业中的风景园林、园林等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力；林学、林业工程等主干学科虽未在第五轮评估中获 A- 及以上评级，但作为行业特色校仍具竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热，但北林以农林为特色，相关工科专业规模有限；山西省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年（173347 人）减少约 5928 人（-3.4%），竞争略有缓解；北京林业大学位于北京，对山西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在山西招生规模较大（理科约 100 人左右），属外省高校中招生较多的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的走势、2026 年小幅扩招（+6.1%）对竞争的加剧作用、山西省物理类考生减少（-3.4%）对竞争的缓解作用，以及声誉偏负面带来的轻微降温效应，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 20780 名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约 21644 名，区间 21144–22144 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11973→14281→17900→13432→20780, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend; the 2025 baseline is about 20780, a significant decline of about 7348 places compared to 2024, mainly due to the new college entrance examination reform (arts/science division → physics/history category) and changes in subject selection requirements; the university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for science (physics category) was 94 in 2021, 96 in 2022, 95 in 2023, 98 in 2024, and 98 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 104, an increase of 6 (about 6.1%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking is around 83–85 in recent years (83rd in 2026), stable, belonging to upper-middle level national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving teacher ethics incidents); Douyin popularity ranking is 51st (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 638,000, attention level is moderately high; regarding historical admission anomalies, there was a sudden drop in ranking in Shaanxi's liberal arts in 2022, but no significant gaps in science; Landscape Architecture is A+ (top in the country), directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Landscape Architecture and Gardening, attracting applicants to related majors; although Forestry and Forestry Engineering did not receive A- or above in the fifth round of evaluation, they remain competitive as industry-specific specialties.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular, but Beijing Forestry University is characterized by agriculture and forestry, with limited scale in related engineering majors; in 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (3.4%) compared to 2025 (173,347), slightly easing competition; Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Shanxi candidates; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Shanxi (about 100 in science), making it one of the universities with higher enrollment among out-of-province institutions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant decline in 2025 rankings, the slight enrollment increase (+6.1%) in 2026 intensifying competition, the decrease in Shanxi physics category examinees (-3.4%) easing competition, and the slight cooling effect from a negative reputation, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to continue declining from the 2025 baseline of 20780; the predicted minimum ranking is about 21644, with a range of 21144–22144.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 21144–22144, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 21000), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors in Tier 1 such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., beyond 22000), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1572→2157→1861→2272→2238, fluctuating within the 1500–2300 range, stabilizing between 1861–2272 in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2238; the enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi Province's liberal arts (history category) was 11 students from 2021 to 2023, 10 in 2024, and 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 12 students, a reduction of 2 students (about -14.3%) compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition (ranking number decreases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 83rd in the Soft Science main ranking, a mid-to-upper level national university; reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents); Douyin popularity ranking 51st (relatively popular), comprehensive popularity about 638,000; historical admission anomalies include a sharp drop in liberal arts rankings in Shaanxi in 2022 (2000→10000), but no significant gaps in Shanxi province; Landscape Architecture is A+, but not directly related to liberal arts admission majors; liberal arts majors like Law, Business Administration, etc., lack A- or above discipline evaluation support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has divided social popularity and is wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, Applied Psychology has average popularity; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is about 63,113, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) from 2025 (84,879), greatly easing competition; Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Shanxi liberal arts examinees; the university's liberal arts enrollment scale in Shanxi is relatively small (about 10–14 students), making competition relatively concentrated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable trend of rankings in the 1861–2272 range over the past 3 years, the easing effect of the 2026 enrollment reduction (-14.3%) on competition, and the significant reduction in history category examinees in Shanxi Province (-25.6%) leading to a notable easing of competition, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 2238; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1996, with a range of 1637–2355.
